name: Qwen2.5-Math-72B
note: Base math-specialized model continual-pretrained from Qwen2.5-72B on Qwen Math Corpus v2; Instruct sibling adds CoT+TIR reasoning.
tpsNote: Q4 weights (~47GB) exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM; requires multi-GPU or CPU offload for local inference.

results.notes: Base model, few-shot CoT; Instruct+TIR variant reaches 87.8
Base model, few-shot CoT, Table 2 of the Qwen2.5-Math Technical Report

verificationNotes: Real model, existence and both result rows confirmed via live fetch of arxiv.org/html/2409.12122v1 (Qwen2.5-Math Technical Report): base model Table 2 shows exactly MATH 66.8 and GSM8K 90.8, matching an improvement of 5.3 points over Qwen2-Math-72B as stated in the paper. paramsB 72.7 confirmed (matches Qwen2.5-72B's official 72.7B/70.0B non-embedding param count) and ctxK 4 confirmed via live config.json fetch (max_position_embeddings=4096, hidden_size=8192, num_hidden_layers=80). License 'qwen'/tongyi-qianwen confirmed on HF. releaseDate 2024-09-18 matches arXiv submission date.
